title: Find My Device - Playing sound from 2 different devices
scenario: Find My Device tone fails with error on second connected headset when two devices are paired in Poly Lens
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. From the Home screen, tap the Poly Lens menu icon.
3. Ensure two Poly Bluetooth headsets are paired and connected to the app.
4. Tap on the first connected headset to select it.
5. Tap the 'Find My Device' feature and play a tone — observe that the tone plays correctly.
6. Return to the Poly Lens menu and tap on the second connected headset to select it.
7. Tap the 'Find My Device' feature and attempt to play a tone.
8. Observe the pop-up error message displayed on screen.
expected: The tone should play on the second connected headset without any errors.
